HF.model.model.layers.{i}.feed_forward.expe: SiLUActivation - In HF's Llama4TextExperts, this is an explicit activation function stored as self.act_fn. In vLLM's SharedFusedMoE, the expert computation is handled by a fused kernel that doesn't expose individual activation functions as separate submodules. The activation is applied within the fused MoE forward pass.
HF.model.model.layers.{j}.feed_forward.expe: SiLUActivation - Same as above for layers without qk_norm. The activation is fused into the kernel operations.
HF.model.model.rotary_emb: Llama4TextRotaryEmbedding - In HF, this is a single shared module at model.model.rotary_emb used across all layers. In vLLM, each attention layer has its own RotaryEmbeddingWrapper instance for performance optimization. This represents an architectural difference: HF uses a shared module approach while vLLM creates per-layer instances.

vLLM.model: Llama4ForConditionalGeneration - This is vLLM's multimodal wrapper containing vision_model, multi_modal_projector, and language_model. The HF model is text-only (Llama4ForCausalLM), so there's no equivalent multimodal top-level wrapper. The HF model corresponds to vLLM's model.language_model sub-component.
vLLM.model.vision_model: Llama4VisionModel - Complete vision processing pipeline with patch embedding, layernorms, encoder layers, and vision adapter. This entire vision model has no counterpart in the text-only HF model.
vLLM.model.vision_model.patch_embedding: Llama4UnfoldConvolution with Unfold and ColumnParallelLinear - Vision-specific component for converting image patches to embeddings. No equivalent in text-only HF model.
vLLM.model.vision_model.patch_embedding.unfol: Unfold - Part of vision patch embedding. No HF equivalent.
vLLM.model.vision_model.patch_embedding.linea: ColumnParallelLinear - Part of vision patch embedding. No HF equivalent.
vLLM.model.vision_model.layernorm_pre: LayerNorm - Pre-encoder vision normalization. No HF equivalent.
vLLM.model.vision_model.layernorm_post: LayerNorm - Post-encoder vision normalization. No HF equivalent.
vLLM.model.vision_model.model: Llama4VisionEncoder - Vision encoder container. No HF equivalent.
vLLM.model.vision_model.model.layers (0..33): Llama4VisionEncoderLayer - 34 vision encoder layers with Llama4VisionAttention (containing MultiHeadAttention, QKVParallelLinear, RowParallelLinear, RotaryEmbeddingWrapper), Llama4VisionMLP (fc1, fc2, GELU), and LayerNorms. No HF equivalent.
vLLM.model.vision_model.vision_adapter: Llama4VisionPixelShuffleMLP - Vision feature adapter with Llama4VisionMLP (fc1, fc2, GELU). No HF equivalent.
vLLM.model.multi_modal_projector: Llama4MultiModalProjector - Projects vision features to text embedding space via linear_1 (ColumnParallelLinear). No equivalent in text-only HF model.
vLLM.model.language_model: Llama4ForCausalLM - This is vLLM's language model wrapper nested under the multimodal root. In HF, the Llama4ForCausalLM is at the root level (model). The internal components are mapped individually.
vLLM.model.language_model.model.layers.{i}.se: RotaryEmbeddingWrapper - vLLM creates per-layer RotaryEmbeddingWrapper instances for optimization. HF uses a single shared model.model.rotary_emb for all layers. This is an architectural difference in organization.

ChunkedLocalAttention - vLLM-specific optimized attention kernel for layers with qk_norm. In HF, attention is computed inline within Llama4TextAttention.forward(), not as a separate submodule. vLLM extracts attention into dedicated kernel modules for performance.
vLLM.model.language_model.model.layers.{j}.se: RotaryEmbeddingWrapper - Same as above for layers without qk_norm.
Attention - Different optimized attention kernel (standard vs ChunkedLocal) for layers without qk_norm. HF computes attention inline.
vLLM.model.language_model.model.layers.{i}.fe: UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod - vLLM quantization configuration object for SharedFusedMoE. This represents vLLM-specific infrastructure for supporting various quantization methods and is not exposed in HF's architecture.

LlamaMLP - Auxiliary structure within vLLM's SharedFusedMoE. Based on the source code, when use_overlapped=True, this _shared_experts module is used for compute-communication overlap optimization. The SharedFusedMoE forward() can compute shared expert results overlapped with all2all dispatch. HF only has feed_forward.shared_expert at the parent level without this optimization structure.
MergedColumnParallelLinear - Part of auxiliary _shared_experts for overlap optimization.
RowParallelLinear - Part of auxiliary _shared_experts for overlap optimization.
SiluAndMul - Part of auxiliary _shared_experts for overlap optimization.
vLLM.model.language_model.model.layers.{j}.fe: UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod - Same as above for layers without qk_norm.
LlamaMLP - Same as above for layers without qk_norm.
MergedColumnParallelLinear - Part of auxiliary _shared_experts for layers without qk_norm.
RowParallelLinear - Part of auxiliary _shared_experts for layers without qk_norm.
SiluAndMul - Part of auxiliary _shared_experts for layers without qk_norm.
vLLM.model.language_model.logits_processor: LogitsProcessor - vLLM-specific module for inference-time logit processing (temperature, top-p/top-k, repetition penalty, etc.). In HF, logit processing is handled by generation utilities (GenerationMixin, LogitsProcessorList) rather than as a model component. This represents an architectural difference in how inference-time operations are organized.
